file_summary: This file defines the configuration structure and functions for loading and managing project configurations.

symbols.name: defaults
symbols.summary: Returns a default configuration with predefined settings.

symbols.name: Load
symbols.summary: Loads the configuration by merging global and project-specific settings.

symbols.name: globalConfigPath
symbols.summary: Determines the path to the global configuration file.

symbols.name: mergeFile
symbols.summary: Merges the configuration from a file into the destination Config.

symbols.name: EnsureProjectDir
symbols.summary: Creates necessary directories for project configuration and data.

symbols.name: ProjectRoot
symbols.summary: Finds the root directory of a project by looking for a marker file.

symbols.name: LLMConfig
symbols.summary: Represents the configuration settings for the Language Model (LLM).

symbols.name: IndexConfig
symbols.summary: Represents the configuration settings for indexing.

symbols.name: Config
symbols.summary: Main configuration structure that includes LLM and index configurations.

symbols.name: cfg
symbols.summary: Holds the default configuration settings initialized by the defaults function.

symbols.name: globalPath
symbols.summary: Stores the path to the global configuration file determined by globalConfigPath.

symbols.name: localPath
symbols.summary: Constructs the path to the local project configuration file.

symbols.name: home
symbols.summary: Stores the user's home directory path retrieved by os.UserHomeDir.

symbols.name: dirs
symbols.summary: List of directories to be created for project configuration and data.

symbols.name: dir
symbols.summary: Initial directory used to search for the project root marker file.

symbols.name: parent
symbols.summary: Parent directory of the current directory in the project root search process.
